rag_rules: Fix syntax errors like 'no viable alternative at input' by ensuring valid AGREE contract structure within annex blocks.
Avoid introducing package-qualified identifiers not present in the model's configured dependencies.
generic_rules: Ensure AGREE expressions reference only visible identifiers or helpers declared in the same annex scope.
Align helper declaration types with the types of the expressions they represent.
Use only AGREE scalar types (int, real, bool) in const and eq declarations.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks.
Assumptions and guarantees referencing ports must be in component type scopes.
Implementation-level bindings belong in component implementation scopes.
anti_patterns: Do not introduce identifiers or types that are not declared or visible in the current AADL scope.
Do not attempt to fix type mismatches by changing the expression without addressing the helper declaration.
irrelevant_topics: AADL package references and with clauses
Component type vs implementation scope placement rules
AGREE validator diagnostics and repair strategies
